data.content: Validated the existing implementation branch in the dedicated worktree /Users/cartine/foolery/work/foolery-c355. The readability changes remain in src/components/agent-history-view.tsx and src/components/interaction-picker.tsx at commit fcba1f7d06f7 on branch work/foolery-c355-impl-20260321, which is already pushed. Sanity gates now pass in that worktree: bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all succeed; bun run lint succeeds with warnings only and the worktree is clean. No additional code changes were required in this implementation retry because the prior rejection was caused by running gates outside the dedicated knot worktree.
